headline: Coinbase Faces 10 New Consumer Protection Rules

article.title: Democrats added certain consumer protection rules to CLARITY: Coinbase exec
article.summary: Coinbase vice chair Ryan VanGrack said that Democratic lawmakers had added provisions on customer protection to a digital asset market structure bill under consideration in the US Senate.

headline: Tether Gold Gains $1Bn Hub in Abu Dhabi

article.title: Tether Gold recognized as Accepted Spot Commodity in Abu Dhabi financial center
article.summary: The recognition allows regulated firms in Abu Dhabi Global Market to offer services involving Tether Gold as tokenized commodities gain broader adoption.

headline: Gilts Plummet 2% on UK Fiscal Concerns

article.title: Gilts Rattled on Andy Burnham’s First Day as Fiscal Fears Return
article.summary: UK government bonds dropped after new Prime Minister Andy Burnham unnerved investors on his first day in the job over his approach to the country’s finances.

headline: Netflix Issues $1 Billion Bond Amid Market Volatility

article.title: Netflix Taps US High-Grade Bond Market With $1 Billion Debt Sale
article.summary: Netflix Inc. raised $1 billion from a US high-grade bond sale on Monday, its first since a debut deal two years ago, as slowing sales growth fuels investor scrutiny of the company’s future.

headline: Metaplanet Buys 10,000 Bitcoins Amid Market Slump

article.title: Metaplanet’s Bitcoin Japan Announces Plan to Scoop Up Coins Despite Market Downturn
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Metaplanet’s Bitcoin Japan Announces Plan to Scoop Up Coins Despite Market Downturn 
Metaplanet subsidiary Bitcoin Japan is starting a crypto treasury.

headline: Bitcoin-Treasury Capital B Plans 10:1 Split in September

article.title: Bitcoin-Treasury Capital B Plans 10-for-1 Reverse Stock Split for September
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin-Treasury Capital B Plans 10-for-1 Reverse Stock Split for September
Capital B will execute a 10-for-1 reverse stock split in September as the Paris-listed bitcoin treasury company looks to attract more institutional investors while continuing to build its 3,139 BTC reserve.

headline: Korea's CBDC Trial Expands to 500,000 Users

article.title: Bank of Korea Scales Up CBDC Pilot With Half a Million Users
article.summary: Phase 1 of Project Hangang opened 81,000 wallets with 42% of them using the CBDC. Phase 2 is bigger, and this time it moves real government money.

headline: Russia Crypto Law Nears Passage In 2 Votes

article.title: Russia's First Comprehensive Crypto Law Is Two Votes Away From Passing
article.summary: The bill licenses exchanges, caps retail investors at about $3,800 a year, and creates a legal pathway for Russian companies to pay foreign partners in crypto—bypassing Western sanctions.

headline: Grayscale Files $1B Worldcoin ETF with SEC

article.title: Grayscale could take Worldcoin to Wall Street after ETF filing with the SEC
article.summary: The first exchange-traded fund tied to Worldcoin could soon be headed to U.S. markets, as Grayscale files for a Worldcoin ETF.

article.title: Kalshi, Polymarket open interest falls 20% as World Cup frenzy winds down
article.summary: Sports accounted for 80% of both Kalshi and Polymarket's total volumes throughout the weekslong World Cup tournament.

article.title: Donald Trump says US to hit Canada with 50% tariff
article.summary: Washington accuses neighbour of engaging in unfair trade practices in move that could reignite trade war

headline: Fed Overhaul Gains Momentum Under Warsh's 6-Month Plan

article.title: Warsh’s quiet revolution at the Fed
article.summary: The new US central bank chief is reluctant to signal future interest rate moves — how will hedge funds react?
